title: Ranged Torches
description: Adds a new type of Torch that can be thrown
body:
# Ranged Torches:

**Torchball:**

Made in a Crafting Table with a Snowball in the middle and a Torch on top.

Stacks up to 16.

Looks like a Snowball with a Torch stuck into the top.

Can be thrown.

While flying, little flame particles will track behind it.

On impact, it will place a Torch and set any entities it hits on fire.

# Other:

**Mod Packs:**

If you want to use this mod in a Mod Pack, you can, as long as you give me credit.


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**IMPORTANT:**

Unfortunately, this mod has been deprecated, meaning from now on, I will not be updating it anymore.

</details>
